GraphicSetName: Leadership in a Gen AI World - Mural Exercise Props
SetPurpose: Starter creative briefs for consistently themed no-text supporting graphics across the presentation and Mural.
VisualSystem: Leadership in a Gen AI World - Centaur Visual System

OutputDefaults.TextPolicy: no text, no labels, no pseudo-letters
OutputDefaults.Style: bright mythic-adventure storybook spot illustration with warm mountain light, antique gold and ink navy accents, clean expressive outlines, smooth painterly shading

Exercises.ParticipantAction: People put stickies about how they feel about Gen AI on a quadrant diagram.

Props.Name: Empowered Torch
Props.ContentDescription: A bronze-and-leather torch held upright by no visible hand, with a warm gold flame and a small contained teal AI spark inside it.
Props.Composition: Centered 3/4 object, transparent background, strong silhouette, soft contact shadow.

Props.Name: Courage Shield
Props.ContentDescription: A round navy-and-antique-gold shield with a compass-star boss, three friendly arrow nicks, and warm light catching the rim.
Props.Composition: Centered front-facing shield, transparent background, no symbols that look like letters.

Props.Name: Tangled Reins
Props.ContentDescription: Slack leather reins loosely tangled around a dim teal orb, with one strap trailing away and a tiny horseshoe charm off balance.
Props.Composition: Simple object cluster, gentle humor, not bleak, transparent background.

Props.Name: Lantern at the Unknown Path
Props.ContentDescription: A small brass-and-leather lantern glowing warmly at the edge of a stylized stone path, with a cool teal glimmer just beyond the light.
Props.Composition: Centered spot illustration, enough warmth to feel safe, no horror imagery.

Exercises.ExerciseName: Centaur and Reverse-Centaur Gen AI Engagement Swimlanes
Exercises.ParticipantAction: People put stickies about how they engage with Gen AI currently in swimlanes.

Props.Name: Partnership Saddle Kit
Props.ContentDescription: A well-fitted leather saddle kit with bronze buckles, a rolled parchment map, a tidy tool pouch, and a safely mounted teal crystal AI lens.
Props.Composition: Medium horizontal prop cluster, 4:3, transparent background, confident and organized.

Props.Name: Compass Reins
Props.ContentDescription: Leather reins gracefully looped around a bronze compass rose, with the compass needle glowing softly toward a chosen path.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Human direction and intentional AI use

Props.Composition: Readable from Mural distance, no text, no map labels.

Props.Name: Overloaded Scroll Pack
Props.ContentDescription: A sagging travel pack overloaded with blank scrolls, loose straps, and several teal-glowing request slips spilling out.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Working for AI, process serving the tool

Props.Composition: Playfully messy, not dark, transparent background.

Props.Name: Awkward Bridle on AI Orbs
Props.ContentDescription: A leather bridle awkwardly wrapped around a small stack of glowing teal AI orbs, with buckles not quite fitting.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Misalignment where people adapt to the tool instead of the tool helping people

Props.Composition: Humorous prop cluster, transparent background, avoid making the AI orbs menacing.

Exercises.ParticipantAction: People privately answer four reflection questions at their desks.

Props.Name: What You Know Scroll
Props.ContentDescription: An unfurled parchment scroll held open by a small horseshoe weight, with decorative non-readable marks and a subtle teal constellation thread.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: What do you know? What did you use it for this week? What did you learn?

Props.Name: Need-to-Know Spyglass
Props.ContentDescription: A brass spyglass with leather grip aimed toward a tiny teal glint, resting on a folded blank map.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: What do you need to know? What do you want to learn next?

Props.Name: Where You Are Trail Cairn
Props.ContentDescription: A small stack of warm grey trail stones with a bronze compass needle and two hoofprints beside it.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Where are you at? How do you see AI's impact on your job?

Props.Composition: Grounded, calm, centered object, no landscape background.

Props.Name: Where You Are Going Path Marker
Props.ContentDescription: A forked-path marker made of carved wood and antique-gold trim with two blank pennants and a subtle teal light path leading forward.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Where are you going? What do you want AI's impact to be?

Props.Composition: Optimistic upward angle, warm sunrise rim light, no words on pennants.

Exercises.ExerciseName: Engaging Direct Reports Around the Curiosity Framework
Exercises.ParticipantAction: People put stickies around a target about how they could engage direct reports.

Props.Name: Compass Target
Props.ContentDescription: A circular target blended with a compass rose, antique-gold rings, navy tick marks, and a tiny teal center glow.
Props.Composition: Top-down circular icon, transparent background, no numbers.

Props.Name: Conversation Campfire
Props.ContentDescription: A small warm campfire circle with three blank parchment cards and three tiny hoofprints arranged around it.

Props.Name: Curiosity Arrow Ring
Props.ContentDescription: Four friendly feathered arrows curving inward toward a soft teal glow, with antique-gold arrowheads and no written question marks.

Subject.SymbolicMeaning: Many ways to invite the same conversation

Props.Composition: Radial ring, light and uncluttered, does not overpower sticky notes.

Props.Name: Mentor Laurel Charm
Props.ContentDescription: A small laurel wreath tied with a leather cord, with a compass-star charm and a tiny teal spark tucked inside.
Props.Composition: Simple centered icon, antique gold, transparent background.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Hoofprint Pair
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: Two soft terracotta-brown hoofprints with one tiny antique-gold sparkle.
BoardSprinkleProps.Use: Tiny corner decoration or trail marker between exercises.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Compass Star Pin
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: A small antique-gold compass-star pushpin with a navy shadow.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Blank Navy Pennant
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: A small blank navy pennant with gold trim on a carved wooden pole.
BoardSprinkleProps.Use: Board edge decoration; must contain no symbol or word.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Tiny Teal Spark
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: A contained teal AI spark with two warm gold motes, soft and not neon.
BoardSprinkleProps.Use: Light AI presence near prompts or examples.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Leather Strap Divider
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: A thin curved leather strap with two bronze rivets and a tiny compass-star charm.

BoardSprinkleProps.Name: Mountain Line Ornament
BoardSprinkleProps.ContentDescription: A pale blue distant mountain line with a tiny antique-gold sun and no scenery behind it.
